Name: Tortuga Dominions
Description: The Tortuga Dominions is a small periphery bandit kingdom located spinward and rimward of Terra, beyond the Federated Suns.  Ruled by a Dame or a Major, the kingdom sustains itself largely from occasional raids launched against the Federated Suns and the Taurian Concordat. The pirate armies of the Tortuga Dominions have earned a reputation for utter depravity, cruelty and ruthlessness.
ReputationStatements: Listen scum, unless you want me to cut your flesh slowly from your body and feed it to the crows, you'd better do as we say!
I've sailed with cutthroats I'd trust before I'd trust a mercenary. No offense.
Commander, Death's Consorts don't mind a bit of a dust up to get the blood pumping, but let's not cross swords again eh?
A rival captain has forgotten whose waters these are. Fly the jolly roger and refresh their memory!
Ye ever hear the saying, a reliable mercenary is rarer than an honest pirate?
Ahoy Commander, word of your deeds has even reached Lady Death's ear. I've got another job for you, one with a good bit of scuttle to be had.
Ahoy Matey! Lady Death sends her compliments. She has authorized me to pass this contract on to you, as a sign of her faith in your abilities.
MissionSuccessStatements: A profitable day for every scoundrel flying our colors. The prize is ours, the crew's happy, and the rum budget just doubled.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: The prize slipped through our fingers, but you fought hard enough to earn your share.
BadFaithFailureStatements: I should cut out your heart and enslave your entire crew for failing this simple task. Leave, before I decide to do it!
